sources: Eurostat ilc_di01 (equivalised disposable income by decile, PT, 2023)
Eurostat hbs_str_t223 (mean consumption expenditure by COICOP, PT, latest)
INE Portugal - Inquérito às Despesas das Famílias
notes: Deciles are annual EQUIVALISED net disposable income in EUR (OECD-modified scale: 1 first adult + 0.5 per extra adult + 0.3 per child). Compare a household by dividing its net monthly income by its equivalence factor then multiplying by 12. Category shares are % of total household consumption expenditure and are then remapped from COICOP divisions to the app's expense categories.
